title:
Module 1
The Basics
subtitle: Course Overview and the Complete Basics to Starting AI Models
output_filename: Module 1 - The Basics/The AI Influencer Method.pdf

left.content: These are the only tools you need. Each one serves a specific function in the content pipeline. Keep it simple — do not overcomplicate your stack.

items: Nano Banana 2 — AI image generation (SFW photorealistic output)
Photopea — Image editing and artifact removal (free)
link.me — Link in bio funnel page (free)

left.title: Higgsfield — All-in-One Option
left.content: Higgsfield ($50/month) bundles AI image generation, video generation, and editing into a single platform. If you want one tool that does everything instead of juggling multiple services, this is the recommended option.

right.content: People start seeing actual results within 2-3 months of consistent posting and output. This is not a get-rich-quick scheme. The operators making serious money have put in months of daily work building their systems. If you are not willing to commit to consistent effort for at least 2-3 months, this is not for you.
What You Do NOT Need to Start

items: You do NOT need a $3,000 PC — cloud-based tools work for beginners
You do NOT need multiple phones — start with one persona, one device
You do NOT need a VPN — unnecessary and can trigger platform suspicion
You do NOT need a team — solo operators can run one page profitably
You do NOT need advanced video editing skills — simple clips outperform complex ones
Instagram — Main traffic and brand hub. This is your most important platform
Threads — Engagement and discovery engine that feeds Instagram growth
Telegram — Pre-sell funnel that warms followers before they subscribe
Fanvue — Paid adult subscription platform for monetization
TikTok — Secondary reach and discovery (supplements Instagram)
Reddit — Niche viral exposure inside specific communities
Twitter/X — Brand presence and discovery through conversations

summary_points: The AI Influencer Method is a real business — expect to see actual results within 2-3 months of consistent posting
Revenue comes from the funnel: Social Media → link.me → Telegram → Fanvue (paid adult subscription platform)
Core tools: Seedream 4.5 (NSFW), Nano Banana 2 (SFW), Photopea, link.me, Telegram, CapCut — Higgsfield ($50/month) as all-in-one alternative
Instagram and Threads are mandatory primary platforms — TikTok, Reddit, and Twitter/X support the system
Start with one persona, master the system, then scale — do not skip steps or rush the process
